query:
SELECT 
  COALESCE(pa.userId, 0) as userId, 
  COALESCE(u.name, CONCAT('Guest-', LEFT(pa.deviceId, 8))) as name,
  COUNT(*) as totalPuzzles, 
  SUM(pa.isCorrect) as totalCorrect,
  SUM(pa.timeMs) as totalTimeMs
FROM puzzle_attempts pa 
LEFT JOIN users u ON pa.userId = u.id
GROUP BY COALESCE(pa.userId, 0), COALESCE(u.name, CONCAT('Guest-', LEFT(pa.deviceId, 8)))
ORDER BY totalPuzzles DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:

  COALESCE(pa.userId, 0) as userId, 
  COALESCE(u.name, CONCAT('Guest-', LEFT(pa.deviceId, 8))) as name,
  COUNT(*) as totalPuzzles, 
  SUM(pa.isCorrect) as totalCorrect,
  SUM(pa.timeMs) as totalTimeMs
FROM puzzle_attempts pa 
LEFT JOIN users u ON pa.userId = u.id
GROUP BY COALESCE(pa.userId, 0), COALESCE(u.name, CONCAT('Guest-', LEFT(pa.deviceId, 8)))
ORDER BY totalPuzzles DESC
LIMIT 20;
